scripts.build:jsx: mkdir -p dist/components && esbuild tweaks-panel.jsx --outfile=dist/tweaks-panel.js --jsx-factory=React.createElement --jsx-fragment=React.Fragment --format=iife && for f in components/icons.jsx components/Nav.jsx components/Hero.jsx components/Team.jsx components/Logos.jsx components/Problem.jsx components/Solution.jsx components/Benefits.jsx components/Services.jsx components/Trust.jsx components/Scenarios.jsx components/CTA.jsx components/Footer.jsx; do esbuild "$f" --outfile="dist/${f%.jsx}.js" --jsx-factory=React.createElement --jsx-fragment=React.Fragment --format=iife; done && esbuild app.jsx --outfile=dist/app.js --jsx-factory=React.createElement --jsx-fragment=React.Fragment --format=iife
